gates.name: release_build
gates.evidence: cargo build --release is the canonical binary build

gates.name: install_docs
gates.evidence: docs/INSTALL.md describes Windows/Linux install and completions

gates.name: shell_completions
gates.evidence: bash, fish, and PowerShell completion files are shipped

gates.name: json_schemas_versioned
gates.evidence: schemas/v1 contains stable JSON Schema 2020-12 files

gates.name: performance_budgets
gates.evidence: release/performance-budgets.json defines startup, doctor, RAG, and acceptance limits

gates.name: ci_scripts
gates.evidence: release-gate workflow runs fmt, tests, clippy, release build, doctor preflight, and smoke scripts

gates.name: full_acceptance_fixtures
gates.evidence: fixtures/full-acceptance contains a deterministic project fixture

gates.name: changelog_release_notes
gates.evidence: CHANGELOG.md and docs/RELEASE_NOTES.md are part of the release packet

gates.name: binary_smoke_windows_linux
gates.evidence: scripts/smoke-windows.ps1 and scripts/smoke-linux.sh smoke the built binary

gates.name: doctor_strict_preflight
gates.evidence: crytex doctor --strict is the required release preflight
